thrift.Title: Vintage Oak Dresser - 6 Drawer
thrift.Description: Beautiful mid-century oak dresser. All drawers slide smoothly. Minor surface wear consistent with age. Solid construction.

thrift.Title: Floral Pattern Throw Pillows (Set of 3)
thrift.Description: Set of three matching decorative throw pillows. Floral pattern, 18x18 inches. Covers are zippered and machine washable.

thrift.Title: Vintage Mirror - Ornate Gold Frame
thrift.Description: Gorgeous ornate gold-framed mirror. 24x36 inches. Some distressing on the frame adds character. Mirror is in excellent condition.

thrift.Title: Women's Denim Jacket - Size M
thrift.Description: Classic women's denim jacket, light wash. Size medium. Great condition with minimal wear. Perfect layering piece.

thrift.Title: Cast Iron Dutch Oven - Number 8
thrift.Description: Large cast iron Dutch oven, pre-seasoned. Number 8 size. Great for camping or oven cooking. Heavy duty.

electronics.Title: Samsung 55" 4K Smart TV
electronics.Description: Samsung 55-inch 4K UHD Smart TV with HDR. Excellent picture quality. Includes remote and stand.

electronics.Title: Apple iPad Air - 64GB WiFi
electronics.Description: Apple iPad Air 4th generation, 64GB, space gray. WiFi model. Screen is flawless. Battery holds full charge.

electronics.Title: Sony WH-1000XM4 Headphones
electronics.Description: Premium noise-cancelling headphones. Bluetooth and wired. All original accessories included. Barely used.

electronics.Title: Nintendo Switch OLED - White
electronics.Description: Nintendo Switch OLED model, white. Includes dock, Joy-Cons, and all cables. Screen protector applied.

electronics.Title: HP LaserJet Printer
electronics.Description: HP LaserJet Pro wireless printer. Black and white. Toner is half full. Works perfectly, recently tested.

furniture.Title: Solid Wood Dining Table - Seats 6
furniture.Description: Beautiful solid wood dining table in natural finish. Seats 6 comfortably. Small scratch on one leg. Very sturdy.

furniture.Title: Leather Recliner - Brown
furniture.Description: Genuine leather recliner in rich brown. Power recline feature works perfectly. Minor patina on armrests.

furniture.Title: Bookshelf - 5 Tier Wood
furniture.Description: Five-tier bookshelf in rustic wood finish. 72 inches tall. Adjustable shelves. Great condition.

furniture.Title: Queen Size Bed Frame - Metal
furniture.Description: Modern black metal bed frame, queen size. Platform style, no box spring needed. Easy assembly.

furniture.Title: Glass Top Coffee Table
furniture.Description: Modern glass top coffee table with chrome legs. Tempered glass, 42x24 inches. No chips or cracks.

clothing.Title: Men's Nike Air Max - Size 11
clothing.Description: Men's Nike Air Max 90, white/black colorway. Size 11. Worn twice, like new condition. Original box included

clothing.Title: Vintage Band T-Shirt - Nirvana
clothing.Description: Authentic vintage Nirvana band tee, 1990s era tour shirt. Size L. Some fading adds to the vintage look.

clothing.Title: Women's Designer Handbag - Guess
clothing.Description: Guess designer handbag in tan leather. Adjustable strap, multiple compartments. Minor wear on corners.

antiques.Title: Victorian Writing Desk - Mahogany
antiques.Description: Authentic Victorian era mahogany writing desk, circa 1880. Original finish with beautiful patina. Working lock with key.

antiques.Title: Porcelain China Plates - Set of 8
antiques.Description: Set of 8 matching porcelain dinner plates. Floral pattern, gold trim. Made in England, circa 1920s. No chips or cracks.

antiques.Title: Brass Ship Bell on Mount
antiques.Description: Vintage brass ship's bell mounted on wooden base. 6 inches diameter. Engraved 'SS Atlantic'. Great nautical decor piece.

general.Title: Bluetooth Speaker - JBL Flip 5
general.Description: JBL Flip 5 portable Bluetooth speaker in black. Waterproof, 12-hour battery. Sounds great, minor cosmetic wear.

general.Title: LED Desk Lamp with USB
general.Description: Modern LED desk lamp with adjustable brightness and color temperature. Built-in USB charging port. Touch controls.

general.Title: Yoga Mat - Premium 6mm
general.Description: Premium non-slip yoga mat, 6mm thick. Purple. Includes carrying strap. Used a handful of times, excellent condition.
